name: Meisei Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Meisei Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells communication, electronic, electric measuring, information processing, other electric and electronic instruments, machineries, and parts in Japan and internationally. It also offers physical and chemical equipment, precision equipment, and others; and computer software. The company's products include radiosonde equipment, automatic radiosonde systems, automated meteorological data acquisition systems, visibility meters, and compact weather stations; and water management technology solutions, including telemetry systems, water discharge warning systems, dam data processing systems, etc. Its products also consist of disaster prevention information systems, QCAST earthquake early warning systems, landslide alert facility systems, external system control seismometers, and seismic intensity meters; neutron monitoring instruments, including space observation units; air-traffic control equipment, such as airport meteorological observing systems, air traffic control systems, and control tower systems for emergency; and space technology diversion for ground equipment. In addition, it offers products in the fields of rocket monitoring used for launching and control devices, as well as satellite-mounted devices, including rocket-mounted cameras, picture compressor equipment, hot gas valve motor controllers, and power sequence distribution boxes; and measuring instruments for various tests and training of military equipment, as well as provides various testing services for assessment of vibration and environmental resistance during launch and thermal design, performance, etc. in space for satellite and rocket components. The company was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Isesaki, Japan. Meisei Electric Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of IHI Corporation.
